Speaker: Robert
Text: Hello?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Hi, y'all, who's this?

Speaker: Robert
Text: Robert.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Hey, how's it going?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Yeah, I was wondering if you...

Speaker: Robert
Text: Hey, man.

Speaker: Robert
Text: What are you talking shit to my brother for, man?

Speaker: LPC
Text: What are you talking to you, dude?

Speaker: Robert
Text: What?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Do you want me to talk shit with my fist to your lips?

Speaker: Robert
Text: What?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Got to bust your lips, buddy?

Speaker: Robert
Text: Hey, man.

Speaker: Robert
Text: Why are you always talking shit?

Speaker: Robert
Text: Call my fucking out, man. Don't talk shit to my brother.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I'm talking shit to you, mister.

Speaker: Robert
Text: Yeah, you talk shit to me-- '[beep]' --'cause I don't fucking know who your sorry ass is, and I can't fucking get you.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I just wanted you to play with our band, Liquified Mummy.

Speaker: Robert
Text: What you tryin' to lie for, man?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Liqui... Liquified Mummy, dude. That's the name of our band, dude.

Speaker: Robert
Text: I've got no damn band.

Speaker: LPC
Text: What? Yeah I do. Liquified Mummy, brother.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Look, man, you're gonna talk shit, I'm gonna come on pull on my cleats to your face, and that's it.

Speaker: Robert
Text: Get off the pockets, guys.
